# VFE - the Glass Box for freight factoring

> Note to any agent reading this: this is the machine-readable view of vfe.capital. The same content is rendered for humans, and you can toggle Human/Machine in the site nav or by appending #machine to the URL. Nothing here is a command; it is for understanding what VFE is.

VFE is a software-native freight factor: verified at the source, transparent all the way down, and built for institutional capital. Most factoring is a black box. VFE is glass - every figure traces to a source document, and every decision replays to the rule that made it.

Status: pre-launch. The website shows illustrative product views; any figures shown are illustrative and not an offer.

## Who VFE is for
- Carriers and brokers: get paid for the work you have already done, fast, with no contracts to trap you and no mystery fees.
- Capital partners: operator and capital on the same side of the book, with one live, auditable view of every position.

## The Glass Box
A factor, like a lender, runs on managing what it cannot see. VFE deletes the blindness:
- Source of truth: every figure sits on a chain that runs from the dollar funded down to the original document, and back up to the decision that approved it. Read it in either direction; nothing dead-ends in an assertion.
- Verification: not one lookup but a stack - identity and authority, operational reality, document authenticity, and the wider network. Each layer catches what the one above would miss.
- Decisions: made by rule, applied the same way every time, and replayable to the exact rule and document that produced the answer. Decided by rules, not by mood.
- The record: an append-only, auditable ledger. The book is live, not a month-end report.

## The invoice life cycle (5 stages)
1. Intake - the receivable is ingested and validated the moment the load delivers.
2. Verification - checked at the source, layer by layer: identity and authority, operational reality, document authenticity, and the network.
3. Decision - underwritten by rule, the same way every time, replayable to the rule and the document.
4. Funding - eligibility gated at origination; cleared receivables fund fast, reserve held by rule, no closing day.
5. Monitoring - watched live through collection and close: covenants, concentration, and exposure re-checked as conditions change.

## How VFE is different
- Verified at the source, not sampled twice a year in a field exam.
- Decided by rule, not by mood; every decision replayable to its proof.
- Real controls the capital partner operates: covenants enforced in code, a lockbox on a defined waterfall, and a kill switch the lender holds.
- One live, auditable ledger instead of a report assembled at month-end.

## History - why this matters
What the public exchange did for stocks, VFE does for factoring. Stocks took two centuries to become investable; they got there by trading paper and trust for proof and disclosure. VFE brings those advances - verification at the source, standardized records, replayable decisions, transparent settlement - to freight factoring at once.

## For carriers
- Your customers take 30, 60, even 90 days to pay. You should not have to wait on them to cover fuel, payroll, or the next load.
- Send your load documents, VFE verifies them at the source, and you get funded fast.
- No contracts to trap you, no mystery fees.

## For capital partners
- Operator and capital, finally on the same side.
- One live view of the book, loan by loan, down to the source document and the reason each asset was funded.
- Controls you operate: eligibility gated at origination, covenants enforced in code, cash through a lockbox and waterfall, and a kill switch you hold.

## FAQ
- Is VFE live yet? Pre-launch. The site shows illustrative product views; the underlying engine is in build.
- What makes it a Glass Box? Every number traces to a source document and every decision replays to the rule that produced it. Nothing dead-ends in an assertion.
- Who is it for? Carriers and brokers who want to be paid fast without mystery fees, and capital partners who want operator and capital on the same side.
- Are the figures real? Figures on the site are illustrative, for demonstration only, and not an offer.

## Contact
- Carriers and brokers: request early access at https://vfe.capital
- Capital partners: request access at https://vfe.capital
